description: Master catalog of all forged tools

tools.name: TOOL_MAHLER_MEASURE
known_issues: Numerical precision degrades above degree ~100 due to root-finding

tools.name: TOOL_GPD_TAIL_FIT
tools.test_source: Synthetic GPD data with known xi = -0.3, 0.0, +0.5 all recovered within 0.03

tools.name: TOOL_CF_EXPANSION
known_issues: zaremba_test is O(q) — slow for q > 10^6, needs sieve optimization for Tier 2

tools.name: TOOL_SINGULARITY_CLASSIFIER
tools.test_source: Fibonacci (radius 0.6180 correct), Catalan (ALGEBRAIC, alpha~0.5 correct), Constant (ENTIRE correct)
known_issues: Simple poles (B~0) may classify as LOG; partition function needs >50 terms for ESSENTIAL detection

tools.name: TOOL_HYPERBOLIC_VOLUME
known_issues: Volume is 0 for non-hyperbolic knots (torus/satellite) — always pair with is_hyperbolic()
volume_conjecture_ratio slow and often unavailable for high-crossing knots

tools.name: TOOL_ROOT_NUMBER
known_issues: Input is a-invariants; Cremona label lookup requires elldata package (not installed in this env)

tools.name: TOOL_CONDUCTOR
also: global_reduction(ainvs) -> dict (conductor, tamagawa_product, bad_primes, per-prime Kodaira/c_p)
tools.test_source: LMFDB conductors (11a1->11, 37a1->37, 389a1->389, 15a1->15, 5077a1->5077). Tamagawa products cross-checked: 14a1 tam=6=2*3, 27a1 tam=3 at IV*, 11a1 tam=5 at I_5 split.
known_issues: PARI local-data slot convention: c_p at index 3 (not 2 as often documented); this is the source of first-pass bugs

stats.notes: REQ-016 (Sturm bound) folded into TOOL_CF_EXPANSION — no separate tool
